criteria.name: time_to_first_functional_result
criteria.hermes_measurement: run the same task style in Hermes Agent and record first usable functional check timestamp

criteria.name: total_time_to_final_merge_ready_proof
criteria.hermes_measurement: record total wall time until Hermes reports tests complete and merge-ready proof exists

criteria.name: evidence_clarity
criteria.hermes_measurement: check whether unit/background status, functional status, and final gate status are separately visible

criteria.name: lock_handling
criteria.hermes_measurement: record Cargo target lock waits or overlapping Cargo jobs

criteria.name: operator_experience
criteria.simplicio_evidence: foreground gates complete while background unit tests run
criteria.hermes_measurement: record whether the terminal remains conversational and usable

simplicio_contract: background unit tests can run while foreground functional gates proceed, and final commit/push/merge blocks unless background-validation final_gate.status is passed
hermes_baseline_policy: external benchmark must use the same repo/task style and keep provider/model differences explicit
